title: chocogaps
description: this 3d resourcepack provides chocolate gaps, with white chocolate being a normal golden apple, and the dark chocolate being an enchanted golden apple
body: this resourcepack provides your game with a 3d model of white and dark chocolate, and a normal 3d apple. The resourcepack replaces a normal golden apple with white chocolate and enchanted golden apples with dark chocolate because the dark chocolate is actually healthier than white chocolates. I was lowkey bored so I made this. enjoy :)
